mainFeatures.title: Idle Cyber Criminal Empire
mainFeatures.description: Create a self-sustaining cyber criminal operation from nothing but your dial-up connection that grows even when offline.

mainFeatures.title: Historical Setting
mainFeatures.description: Experience the internet's most lawless era, from the gold rush of the dot-com venture capital in 1997 to the choas of Y2K and crash in 2001.

mainFeatures.title: Botnet Progression
mainFeatures.description: Compromised machines join your network to turn into passive offline income to further upgrade your cyber criminal operation.

mainFeatures.title: Dynamic World Progression Events
mainFeatures.description: The World Wide Web doesn't stay the same for long. The Y2K panic and the dot-com bubble are real historical moments that reshape the face of the internet, but open new opportunities.

mainFeatures.title: Heat & Evasion
mainFeatures.description: Keep yourself one step ahead of the early cyber criminal law enforcement and cybersecurity firms as your heat meter climbs with every action performed against cyber infrustructure targets.

mainFeatures.title: Windows 98 Inspired Aesthetic
mainFeatures.description: A retro UI system inspired by the era. All menus and buttons feel right out of 1997 without compromising the mobile game interactivity focus.

features: Send phishing emails and brute force passwords in your humble beginnings
Upgrade and deploy worms and keyloggers to compromise your targets
Launch coordinated DDoS attacks using your botnet network
Target the dot-com startups backed with big venture capital and little security.
Unlock new attack vectors as your reputation in the underground hacker communities grows.
Recruit specialists that increase your operation's throughput
Upgrade from the humble beginnings of a single dial-up connection to a network of compromised servers.
Expand your botnet network to generate offline income for future upgrades.
When the heat gets too much, burn your identity and start fresh.
Restart your progress with permanent bonuses from your knowledge.
With each prestige, you grow faster to where you were and excel past your previous peak.
Climb the leaderboard of the underground hacker communities to become a legend.
